name: Accounts
description: GST, TDS, Income Tax, TCS and day-to-day book-closure compliance owned by the Finance team.

items.title: File GSTR-1
items.description: Outward supplies return — upload sales invoices for the preceding month.
items.penalty: Rs.50/day (Rs.20/day for nil) late fee + 18% p.a. interest
items.notes: Reconcile with Tally sales register and channel settlements (Amazon, Shopify, Blinkit) before filing.

items.title: File GSTR-3B
items.description: Summary return with tax payment — net output tax less input tax credit.
items.penalty: Rs.50/day late fee + interest at 18% p.a. on tax dues
items.notes: Reconcile with GSTR-2B before claiming ITC. Pay GST via Challan PMT-06 if cash ledger insufficient.

items.title: GSTR-2B vs Purchase Register reconciliation
items.description: Match vendor-side uploaded invoices with our booked purchases. Follow up on missing invoices.
items.notes: ITC can only be claimed for invoices appearing in GSTR-2B per Section 16(2)(aa).

items.title: Deposit TDS
items.description: Pay TDS deducted in the preceding month via Challan ITNS-281.
items.penalty: 1% p.m. for non-deduction, 1.5% p.m. for non-deposit, u/s 201
items.notes: March TDS has an extended due date of 30 April.

items.title: Deposit TCS
items.description: Pay TCS collected (e.g., on scrap sales) via Challan ITNS-281.

items.title: File quarterly TDS return (24Q / 26Q / 27Q)
items.description: Quarterly statement of TDS — salaries (24Q), non-salary residents (26Q), non-residents (27Q).
items.notes: Issue Form 16A to deductees within 15 days of filing.

items.title: Pay Professional Tax (PT)
items.description: State professional tax for employees and enrolment.
items.notes: Check applicable state — Maharashtra, Karnataka, West Bengal etc. have different slabs and due dates.

items.title: File Income Tax Return (ITR-6)
items.description: Annual return of income for the company.
items.notes: Extended to 31 Oct for cases subject to tax audit.

items.title: Tax Audit (Form 3CA/3CB/3CD)
items.description: Tax audit report by chartered accountant if turnover exceeds the threshold.

items.title: File GSTR-9 (Annual return)
items.description: Consolidated annual return of outward supplies, ITC claimed and tax paid.
items.notes: GSTR-9C reconciliation statement required if turnover exceeds Rs.5 cr.

items.title: Monthly MIS close
items.description: Generate monthly MIS — P&L, channel-wise contribution, cash flow — in the Reporting section.
items.notes: Depends on bank & channel recons being completed first.
